No opposition and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' Motion to Advance the Current Trial Date with Preference is GRANTED pursuant to CCP 36(a). No opposition filed. The return holding date of December 7, 2020 is vacated. The new trial date is October 19, 2020 at 11:15 a.m. in Department 503. Last day pursuant to C.C.P. 36(f) is October 30, 2020.
